titleStmt.title: SII 36.214: original edition by P Shanmugam
No. 214. (A.R. No. 214 of 1910.) PĀḌI (Tiruvalidāyam), SAIDAPET TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT. On the south wall of the maṇḍapa in front of the central shrine in the Tiruvallīśvara temple.

summary.p: The name of the king is lost. Nithyānantha Bhaṭṭan, a śiva-brāhmaṇa figures in the following inscription (No. 216), which is dated in the reign of Rājarāja III. Therefore this inscription could be assigned to Rājarāja III.

Records that Tiruchchiṟṟambalamuḍaiyāṉ, a brāhmaṇa of Tiruveṇkāḍu in Nāṅgūr-nāḍu, a subdivision of Chōḻa-maṇḍalam, installed the deity Aḻagiya Tiruchchiṟṟambalam Uḍaiya Nāyaṉār in the temple of Tiruvallidāyamuḍaiya Nāyaṉār at Tiruvallidāyam in Ambattūr-nāḍu, a subdivision of Puḻaṟ-kōṭṭam alias Vikramachōḻa-vaḷanāḍu, in Jayangoṇḍachōḻa-maṇḍalam and granted ten aṉṟādu-naṟ-paḻaṅkācu for providing services, sacred food and for lighting one twilight lamp (chandi viḷakku). The ten kācus were received by the three śiva-brāhmaṇas holiding the right of service (kāṇi) in the temple as deposit and agreed to provide the above services. Mentions the grain measure tiruñānsambandanāḻi.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī tiripuvaṉac cakkaravattikaḷ śrī
tevaṟku yāṇṭu 10 6 ṟāvatu jayaṅkoṇṭa co
ḻa maṇṭalattup puḻaṟ koṭṭamāṉa vikkirama
coḻa vaḷanāṭṭu Ampattūr nāṭṭut tiruvallitā
yattu Uṭaiyār tiruvallitāyamuṭaiya nāyaṉā
r koyiṟ kāṇiuṭaiya śivabrāhmaṇaril bhāradvā
ji nityānan=ta bhaṭṭaṉ prammīcuramuṭaiyāṉāṉa nāṟ
patteṇṇāyira bhaṭṭaṉ Uḷḷiṭṭārum kāśyapa
gotrattut tirucciṟṟampala bhaṭṭaṉ Āḻvāṉṉāṉa nā
ṟpatteṇṇāyira bhaṭṭaṉ Uḷḷiṭṭārum Ikkuṭit
tiruvallitāyamuṭaiyāṉāṉa kulottuṅka bhaṭṭaṉ U
ḷḷiṭṭārum Ivaṉaivomum Ubhaiyaṅ koṇṭu śilā
lekhai paṇṇiṉapaṭi Iṉṉāyaṉār koyiṟ tiruccuṟ
ṟukku Uḷḷuc coḻa maṇṭalattu nāṅkūr nāṭṭut ti
ruveṇkāṭṭut tirumaṭaiviḷākattirukkum brāhmaṇari
l bhāradvāji tiruviṭaiyāṉ tiruvirāmīcuramuṭaiyāṉṉā
ṉ tiruppatiyam viṇṇappam ceyyum tirucciṟṟampalamu
ṭaiyāṉ Āśrayaliṅkamāka Eḻuntaruḷuvitta nāyaṉār
Aḻakiya tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiya nāyaṉārkku pūjaiyum
Amutupaṭiyum cantiviḷakkum candrādittavarai celuttuva
tāka Ittiruvirāmicuramuṭaiyāṉāṉa tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyāṉ
pakkal nāṅkaḷ Ubhaiyamākak kaikkoṇṭa Aṉṟāṭu naṟ paḻaṅ
kācu 10 Ippaḻaṅkācu pattukkum Iṉṉāyaṉāraip pūjittoru
sandhiyile tiruñāṉacampanta nāḻiyāle Iru nāḻi Ariciyum 1
Amutum Amutu ceyvittukkoḷḷak kaṭavomākavum Oru canti
viḷakku Erikkak kaṭavomākac cammatittom Ik koyiṟ tiruvuṇ
m Itu ra rakṣai
Digital edition of SII 36.214 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
